name: White Chicken Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 cans (4 oz.) mild whole green chilies, drained and chopped
5 boneless, skinless chicken breast halves, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the beans in cold water overnight.
2. Drain, place in a pan, and cover with 2 inches of cold water. Simmer until tender, then drain.
3. In a separate heavy saucepan, melt 4 tablespoons butter over medium heat. Add chopped onions and sauté until soft.
4. In another heavy saucepan, melt the remaining butter and whisk in flour. Cook, stirring constantly for 3 minutes without browning.
5. Gradually stir in chicken broth and half-and-half while continuously whisking. Bring to a boil and simmer for 5 minutes.
6. Stir in tabasco, chili powder, cumin, salt, and white pepper into the saucepan with the thickened mixture.
7. Add beans, chopped chilies, cooked chicken pieces, cheese, and simmer, stirring occasionally for 20 minutes.
8. Just before serving, stir in sour cream into the chili.
